routing.__comment_routing_format: Agent routing: each agent maps low/medium/high significance turns to a provider name from the providers block.
routing.__comment_routing_default: Default: all agents route to codex (local Claude binary). Set CODEX_BIN to your codex executable path.
routing.__comment_routing_alternatives: To use a local OpenAI-compatible server instead, swap all 'codex' values to 'local' and set base_url above.

heuristic.__comment_high_stakes_terms: Vault-local primer/high-stakes.yaml takes priority over this. If set here, these terms score +4 each, pushing turns to full processing.
heuristic.__comment_biographical_terms: Override the default family/life-event terms used for biographical density detection. null = use built-in defaults.
heuristic.__comment_affect_terms: Override the default emotion vocabulary. null = use built-in defaults.
heuristic.__comment_heuristic_config_format: The __comment_* keys are documentation only and are ignored by the runtime.

iip.__comment: Interpersonal Interpretation Protocol: deterministic validator on interpret-a-person turns. validator_enabled=false disables enforcement at runtime (detector fires still log); max_regenerations bounds the retry cost per turn.

psyche.__comment: Language gate on MACHINE-AUTHORED psychology only (analyst-minted patterns, prediction expectations); user notes are always stored verbatim. null = built-in defaults; [] = gate fully disabled (e.g. a clinician's practice, where the operator mints diagnostic language professionally); a list of terms replaces the default.

embeddings.query_prefix: Represent this sentence for searching relevant passages:
